title: tauschia johnstoniana
intro: Tauschia johnstoniana, also known as Johnston's tauschia or mountain tauschia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, where it grows in dry, rocky areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene and phenylethanoid compounds. Herbal preparations of Tauschia johnstoniana can be used to support digestive health, immune function, and to reduce inflammation, and are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions.
